scripts.start:prod: concurrently "npm run start:ml" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.start:ml: cd ml-service && (python3 app.py || python app.py || echo 'ML service skipped')
scripts.start:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && serve -s build -l 3000
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
